classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为正面测力面的圆形安装结构图，包含孔径、孔数、角度、均布螺纹孔、航空插座位置以及Fx、Fy、Mz方向标识等机械安装与定位信息；可见'6P航空插座'但未给出针脚编号与功能对应关系，因此归入机械尺寸。

Kept main reading; discarded ocr_015 as overlapping duplicate with capitalization variant.

Corrected missing diameter symbol from visible callout context.
Corrected OCR '6xM√6' to threaded-hole count and depth callout; discarded overlapping fragments ocr_020, ocr_022, ocr_023, ocr_024.
Corrected OCR 'OL' to visible diameter callout; discarded ocr_025 as overlapping partial duplicate.
Kept complete label; discarded overlapping ocr_028 and ocr_029 partial duplicates.

terminology_notes: ▽ is treated as a depth symbol in hole/thread callouts.
translation_notes: Direction labels Fy+, Fx+ and Mz+ are kept as engineering axis markers.

Rotational axis/moment label, not a dimensional feature.
Angular dimension marked on the right side with extension lines and arrowheads.
Arrow direction label indicating positive force axis, not a dimensional size.
Leader line points to a hole feature; OCR required symbol correction.
Diameter callout points to the outside circular profile.

Diameter callout points to the dashed circular bolt pattern.
Text labels the drawing view, not a dimension.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front side includes 6 × M4 threaded holes depth 6 on an Ø70 pitch circle, plus additional Ø5 and Ø12 depth callouts.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Outer circular profile is called out as Ø80.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: A 6-pin aviation socket is identified on the upper-right side of the front face.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Some visually apparent angle/linear callouts were not included because no usable OCR source_id was available.

unresolved_items.description: Visual callout '47.5°' appears on the left upper arc but has no corresponding OCR source_id in ocr_source_boxes, so it was not promoted to a text annotation.
Visual callout '8' appears near the connector but has no corresponding OCR source_id in ocr_source_boxes, so it was not promoted to a text annotation.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整标注源图中对应黄色框内的背面安装面视图，包含圆形安装结构、孔位分布、角度定位标注'0°'、'355°'、'185°'以及尺寸'Φ70'、'2 x ⌀ 5 ▽ 4'，用于表达机械安装孔和外形定位尺寸。

regions.group_name: 安装孔与定位销孔说明
regions.content:
1. 正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm；正面的定位销孔是2个Φ5▽6；
  2. 传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm；
  3. 背面安装面的定位销孔是2个Φ5▽4。
regions.content_en:
1. The mounting holes on the front force-measuring surface are 6 M4 tapped holes, depth 6mm; the front locating pin holes are 2 Φ5▽6.
  2. The sensor comes with 6 M4 hexagon socket head cap screws, front installation, maximum screw protruding length is 6mm.
  3. The locating pin holes on the back mounting surface are 2 Φ5▽4.

items.text: 1.正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm;
正面的定位销孔是2个の56;
2.传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装
螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm;
3.背面安装面的定位销孔是2个の54。

labels.translation_en_full: 3. The back mounting face has 2 locating pin holes of Φ5 with depth 4mm

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
